questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the entrance to the Kiyomizu-Dera temple in Kyoto, Japan. This is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of the most famous landmarks in Japan. It is known for its large wooden stage that extends out from the main hall, offering a panoramic view of Kyoto. The architecture is characteristic of traditional Japanese temples, with intricate woodwork and a curved roof.

gt_answers.Large: The image shows a traditional Japanese temple gate, known as a torii.
